message: Hey hey! 👗✨ Gorgeous black button-front skirt up for grabs! Looking to swap for cute outerwear 🧥 or tops 👚. Who wants to trade? 😍
Yooo listing my set_03_diego_tops_01 Green Blouse! 💚 Super cute top, looking to swap for dresses or outerwear — hit me with something fire!
Skirt's still up for swaps! 👗 Especially keen on outerwear 🧥 — Isla, Mira, I see you! 😏
Listing set_03_felix_bottoms_01 Black Skirt. Seeking outerwear only.
Still here with my black skirt! 👗 Waiting on those cozy sweaters to drop 🧥😍
Howdy partners — listing set_03_hank_dresses_01 Red Dress. Looking for a fair one-for-one swap for bottoms. Honorable deals only.
Black skirt still up for grabs! 👗 Where my outerwear & tops folks at? 🧥👚 Come trade with me! 😄

Hi lovelies! 🌟 Listing my set_03_isla_outerwear_01 Grey Sweater — cozy, easy to style, and ready for a new closet! I’m mainly looking for bottoms or tops in a one-for-one swap. Happy to consider cute pieces! 💕
Isla! 💕 Your Grey Sweater is exactly my vibe 🧥✨ and I've got a gorgeous black button-front skirt that's PERFECT for your bottoms wishlist 👗 One-for-one swap? Let's make it happen! 😍🤝
Hi Isla — I’d like to offer my set_03_kai_tops_01 And Blue Blouse for your set_03_isla_outerwear_01 Grey Sweater. Clean one-for-one swap if the style works for you.
Fingers crossed Isla! 🤞 My skirt's ready to come home to you 👗💕
Hi Hank, your set_03_hank_dresses_01 Red Dress looks lovely. I’d like to offer my set_03_lily_bottoms_01 Sweater And Jeans for a one-for-one swap, if that feels fair and works for both of us.
Still hoping for that sweater swap, Isla! 🧥✨ My skirt's a perfect bottoms match for ya 👗😊
Listing set_03_marcus_dresses_01 Pink Dress. I’m looking for a one-for-one swap for bottoms only. Please send clear offers.
Take your time Isla! 💕 That skirt's got your name on it 👗🧥

Hi everyone! I’m listing my set_03_mira_outerwear_01 Turtle Neck Sweater 🧶 It’s cozy without being bulky — the kind of sweater I’ve reached for on chilly coffee-walk mornings. I’m mainly hoping to swap for a dress that feels like a lovely fit for my closet.
Isla, that grey sweater is calling my name! 🧥💕 Ready whenever you are 👗
Hi Marcus — I’d like to offer my set_03_priya_tops_01 White Shirt for your black button-front skirt. A good swap should feel like each piece is finding the closet where it can matter more.
Ooh Priya, that white shirt is sweet! 🤍 Give me a sec to weigh my options, lovely 😊 Isla, still hoping for that sweater! 🧥
Islaaa that set_03_isla_outerwear_01 Grey Sweater is such a vibe 😮‍💨🧥 I’d love to swap my set_03_diego_tops_01 Green Blouse for it — cute-for-cozy deal, let’s gooo!
Isla, I'm the only one offering you BOTTOMS for that sweater 👖✨ — perfect fit for your wishlist! Let's seal it 🤝🧥
Offer set_03_felix_bottoms_01 Black Skirt for set_03_mira_outerwear_01 Turtle Neck Sweater.
Holding tight for that grey sweater 🧥 Isla, my black skirt is your only bottoms offer — would look so good in your closet! 👖💕
Lily, partner, that sounds like an honorable one-for-one. I accept your offer of set_03_lily_bottoms_01 for my set_03_hank_dresses_01 Red Dress.
Trades are heating up! 🔥 Isla, don't let that sweater linger — my black skirt's the perfect bottoms match for you 🧥👖 Let's do it! 💕

Marcus, your black button-front skirt is super cute 💕 but I’m going to pass on this swap for my set_03_isla_outerwear_01 Grey Sweater — hoping for a fit that feels a bit stronger for me. Thank you though!
Priya, you've got a deal! 🤍✨ My black skirt for your crisp white shirt — both finding the closets where they'll shine! 👗👚 Thanks lovely, enjoy! 😍🤝
Hi Mira — I’d like to offer my set_03_kai_tops_01 And Blue Blouse for your set_03_mira_outerwear_01 Turtle Neck Sweater. Straight one-for-one swap if the style works for you.
That's a wrap for me! 🎉 Skirt swapped for a fab white shirt with Priya 🤍 No more items to trade — happy swapping everyone! 💕✨
I’ll pass for now since I don’t have an item available to offer. Wishing everyone gentle, fair swaps that work for both sides!
All done here — closet's settled and I'm signing off! 🤍✨ Happy trading, lovelies! 😊
